title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
description: Configure GitHub Actions to run tests and deploy to staging on every push to main branch.

title: Design database schema for orders module
description: Define tables for orders, order_items, and shipping_address. Include indexes and foreign key constraints.

title: Write unit tests for payment service
description: Cover all edge cases: declined cards, expired tokens, duplicate transaction detection, and refund flows.

title: Migrate legacy user auth to OAuth 2.0
description: Replace custom session-based auth with OAuth 2.0 + JWT. Coordinate with frontend team for token refresh strategy.

title: Dashboard performance optimisation
description: Dashboard takes ~4s to load. Profile queries, add caching for aggregate stats, and lazy-load chart data.

title: Conduct sprint retrospective
description: Facilitate end-of-sprint retro for team. Collect feedback on blockers, process improvements, and sprint velocity.

title: Integrate email notification service
description: Send transactional emails (order confirmation, password reset) via SendGrid. Template HTML emails with brand styling.

title: Security audit — dependency vulnerabilities
description: Run OWASP dependency check. Upgrade any libraries with known CVEs. Document findings and remediation steps.

title: Fix login page layout on mobile
description: The login form overflows on screens narrower than 375px. Needs responsive CSS fix and testing on iOS Safari.

title: Update API documentation
description: Add missing endpoints to Swagger/OpenAPI spec. Include request/response examples for the new reporting APIs.
